summary: Tested iteration 59 feature: Audit trail (trace d'audit) for approved expenses. All features verified - Admin sees full audit trail with strike motifs, Manager sees audit trail WITHOUT motifs. Print A4 and Détail par achat show brief audit summary (counts only) without motifs. Regression test passed: struck lines badge still visible for admin.

minor.issue: approved_by field was missing from ExpenseUpdate model - FIXED during testing

critical_code_review_comments: AchatsTab.jsx lines 42-91: computeAuditTrail() correctly compares original_items with items to detect added/removed/modified/struck changes
AchatsTab.jsx line 1429: showDetails = currentUser?.role === 'admin' - correctly restricts motif visibility to admin only
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1425-1490: Audit trail <details> block appears BEFORE action buttons in approved expenses view
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1431-1440: Summary shows counts format: (+X ajoutée(s), −Y supprimée(s), Z rayée(s), W modifiée(s))
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1442-1486: Detailed audit items with color coding: green (added), rose (removed), red (struck), blue (modified)
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1465-1467: Strike motif only shown when showDetails=true (admin only)
CaissePage.jsx lines 1765-1796: briefAudit() helper computes counts-only summary for print (no motifs)
CaissePage.jsx line 1814: Print A4 shows '📜 Liste corrigée par admin : {auditSummary}' in orange italic
CaissePage.jsx lines 2093-2096: Print Détail shows audit footer with counts only
seed_data_creation: Created test expense 'TEST_Audit_Trail_iter59' with 4 original items (Tomate, Riz, Sucre, Oignon = 50000 F). Admin corrections: +1 Pomme (added), -1 Oignon (removed), 1 Sucre rayée (motif: À reporter), 1 Riz modifiée (qté 10→15). Final amount: 45000 F. Test data cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 added audit trail feature for approved expenses. When an expense has original_items (snapshot from manager submission) and items differ (admin corrections), a <details> block '📜 Liste corrigée par {approved_by}' appears in the approved expenses view. The summary shows counts: (+X ajoutée, −Y supprimée, Z rayée, W modifiée). When expanded, it shows detailed changes with color coding. IMPORTANT: Admin sees strike motifs (e.g., 'À reporter'), but Manager does NOT see motifs (only 'Rayée: description'). Print functions (A4 and Détail) show brief audit summary (counts only) without motifs. The struck lines badge '🚫 X ligne(s) rayée(s) (masquée(s) à l'impression)' remains visible for admin only.

frontend: Audit trail <details> block appears BEFORE action buttons in approved expenses view - VERIFIED

Manager does NOT see strike motif (only 'Rayée: description') - VERIFIED (via code review)

Print A4 does NOT show strike motifs - VERIFIED
Print Détail shows audit footer with counts only - VERIFIED

backend: original_items snapshot preserved from manager submission - VERIFIED
Final amount correctly calculated excluding struck items (45000 F) - VERIFIED
approved_by field now properly saved via ExpenseUpdate model - FIXED & VERIFIED

rca_of_the_issue: Minor bug found: approved_by field was missing from ExpenseUpdate Pydantic model in /app/backend/routers/expenses.py. This caused the approved_by value to be ignored when updating expenses. Fixed by adding 'approved_by: Optional[str] = None' to the model.
